mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_product_comment c WHERE c.product_id = #{productId} AND c.parent_id = 0 AND c.status = 1

SELECT c.id AS commentId, c.product_id AS productId, c.sku_id AS skuId, c.user_id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.user_avatar AS userAvatar, c.rating AS rating, c.content AS content, c.like_count AS likeCount, c.create_time AS createTime FROM tb_product_comment c LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.product_id = #{productId} AND c.parent_id = 0 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY
c.like_count DESC, c.id DESC
c.create_time DESC, c.id DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_product_comment WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND parent_id = 0 AND status = 1
SELECT AVG(rating) FROM tb_product_comment WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND parent_id = 0 AND status = 1 AND rating IS NOT NULL
